response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong TypeScript and cloud infrastructure skills, he falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience building production-grade AI solutions. His exposure to AI, agentic workflows, and MCP appears limited to his most recent role, and he lacks demonstrated expertise in Python, RAG architectures, and vector databases, which are core requirements for this position.
strengths: Extensive software engineering background (15+ years) with staff-level experience and strong TypeScript/Node.js proficiency.
Relevant recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Proven experience building scalable cloud infrastructure, microservices, and data platforms using AWS CDK and Kubernetes.
concerns: Fails to meet the hard requirement of 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions, with AI experience limited to only the most recent role.
No mention of Python, vector databases, or retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures.
Limited evidence of customer-facing enterprise consulting or leading technical discovery sessions with external stakeholders.
